text.title: RAG Policy Thresholds Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping signal values to colour + default action; gates scaffolding by trigger validity + owner + freshness.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — refuse vague trigger; named cadence only
refresh: run quarterly review first; do NOT compute colours from stale thresholds

branch.question: every signal has numeric amber + red thresholds + ≥1 evidence?

conclusion.verdict: repair: replace any non-numeric threshold; require evidence anchor per signal
colour=Red; fire actions.red immediately; sponsor notified within 4h
colour=Amber; PM-scheduled mid-week health-check; surface in next sync with evidence
colour=Green; continue normal cadence; record in review log

text.example: trigger=weekly_status → fresh → schedule_variance=22 > red_threshold=20 → Red; fire distressed-project-rescue playbook.
